STRATOSYNC SilverCare Tier1 – Agent Edition Implementation Guide

Scope:
High-value consulting deployment (¥2M–3M per engagement)

Workflow:
1. Executive Schema Input Collection
2. Structured Management Interview (90–120 min per executive)
3. KPI Data Integration
4. Mode 1–7 Full Execution
5. Executive Synthesis Report (Board-Level)
6. Strategic Alignment Workshop

Deliverables:
- Executive Bias Profile
- Leadership Cohesion Map
- Friction Probability Model
- Succession Risk Heatmap
- 3-Scenario Strategic Branch Analysis

Positioning:
Not a diagnostic tool.
Not HR analytics.
Not BI dashboard.

This is a Board-Level Decision Architecture.
